category.name: Diagnostic Launch Workshops
category.description: In-person diagnostic business launch workshops from the Win With Barlow company website.

workshops.title: Las Vegas Diagnostic Launch Workshop
workshops.shortDescription: A hands-on day in Las Vegas to build, price, and launch your diagnostic testing business with confidence.
workshops.description: Launching a diagnostic testing business doesn't have to be overwhelming. This in-person workshop equips entrepreneurs and healthcare professionals with practical instruction for DNA testing, drug testing, background screening, specimen collection, and business startup workflows.
workshops.requirements: Enrollment covers one student. Photo ID and a signed NDA are required for entry. Location details are provided two weeks before the session.
workshops.cancellationPolicy: All sales are final and non-refundable. If you cannot attend, you may switch to a future online or in-person session within 12 months, subject to availability.

workshops.title: Jackson Diagnostic Launch Workshop
workshops.shortDescription: Hands-on diagnostic launch training in Jackson for entrepreneurs entering the testing industry.
workshops.description: Build the technical and business skills needed to launch diagnostic testing services. Covers compliance workflows, DOT and non-DOT drug testing scenarios, business funding basics, and operational setup.
workshops.requirements: Enrollment covers one student. Photo ID is required for entry.
workshops.cancellationPolicy: All sales are final and non-refundable. Seat transfers to a future session are available within 12 months when space allows.

workshops.title: Chicago Diagnostic Launch Workshop
workshops.shortDescription: Chicago in-person workshop for launching and scaling a diagnostic testing business.
workshops.description: Interactive training for clinicians, lab consultants, and entrepreneurs adding testing services. Includes mock DOT scenarios, marketing templates, and direct lab account guidance.
workshops.requirements: Enrollment covers one student. Photo ID is required for entry.
workshops.cancellationPolicy: All sales are final and non-refundable. Seat transfers to a future session are available within 12 months when space allows.

workshops.title: Indianapolis Diagnostic Launch Workshop
workshops.shortDescription: Indianapolis launch workshop for diagnostic entrepreneurs and mobile lab startups.
workshops.description: Full-day workshop covering business startup, specimen collection, background screening, fingerprinting, contract work, and monetization strategies for testing services.
workshops.requirements: Enrollment covers one student. Photo ID is required for entry.
workshops.cancellationPolicy: All sales are final and non-refundable. Seat transfers to a future session are available within 12 months when space allows.
